texto: Saturday, May 22d.---It is now Saturday night, and I must prepare for the holy Sabbath. My Bible and Confession of Faith are my traveling companions, and precious friends have they been to me. I bless God for that glorious summary of Christian doctrine contained in our noble standards. It has cheered my soul in many a dark hour, and sustained me in many a desponding moment. I love to read it, and ponder carefully each proof text as I pass along.
explicacao: Orientação direta de James Henley Thornwell sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Saturday, May 22d.---It is now Saturday night, and I must prepare for the holy Sabbath. My Bible …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, bible, sabbath, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
